footer.about: AI-powered Google Shopping feed optimization for stores that want fewer disapprovals, better CTR, and more revenue per click.

exitPopup.title: Before you go — score your Google Shopping feed.
exitPopup.lead: Free AI audit. We grade every product on titles, descriptions, GTIN, highlights and 3 more Google Shopping criteria, then ship the exact fixes that boost visibility.

auditBanner.title: Score your Google Shopping feed in 30 seconds.
auditBanner.lead: Our AI scores every product on titles, descriptions, GTIN, product highlights and 3 more Google Shopping criteria — then shows the exact fixes that boost visibility. You get a Feed Quality Score from 0 to 100 plus a per-product breakdown.

auditPromo.title: Free product feed audit
auditPromo.lead: AI scores your feed on 7 Google Shopping criteria (title, description, GTIN, highlights, +3) — overall score 0–100 + actionable fixes.
